scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n web,electron "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/electron dev"
scripts.build:audio:plugins: cargo check -p sphere-audio-plugins && cargo check --manifest-path extentions/template/Cargo.toml && bun install --cwd extentions/template && bun run --cwd extentions/template typecheck
scripts.build:electron: bun run build:audio:plugins && bun run --cwd apps/electron build:all
scripts.build:all: bun run build:wasm && bun run build:native && bun run build:electron
scripts.check: bun run cargo:check && bun run --cwd apps/web lint
scripts.lint: bun run cargo:clippy && bun run --cwd apps/web lint
